extraction.one_line_summary: ALAPHILIPPE Julian won from a large group sprint after ROELANDTS Jürgen's attack with sub-3km was shut down by Bora-Hansgrohe.
tactical_patterns: ROELANDTS attack inside 3km forced Bora-Hansgrohe into isolation work, potentially weakening their sprint positioning despite neutralizing move.
Deceuninck positioned ALAPHILIPPE perfectly on technical uphill finish while rivals expended energy chasing late ROELANDTS move.
THOMAS Geraint won 2017 edition attacking 5km out, suggesting this finish rewards late attacks over pure sprinting.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: Won despite admitting team lost significant time yesterday, showing individual stage-hunting tactics prioritized over GC defense.
rider_signals.ROELANDTS Jürgen: positive: Nearly succeeded with sub-3km attack on uphill finish, confirming danger-man status on punchy technical finales.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: Present in final group but Bora-Hansgrohe isolated doing chase work suggests team coordination issues on selective finishes.
